title: Scalp Specialist Manager
description:
1. Salon Operations & Management

  • Oversee daily salon operations to ensure smooth workflow and service excellence

  • Manage staff scheduling, attendance, and duty rosters

  • Ensure compliance with salon SOPs, hygiene standards, and safety regulations

  • Handle opening and closing procedures, cash handling, and daily sales reports

  • Coordinate maintenance of equipment and treatment rooms

2. Scalp & Hair Treatment Expertise

  • Perform professional scalp analysis using tools and consultations

  • Recommend suitable scalp and hair treatments based on customer needs

  • Supervise and guide therapists on treatment techniques and protocols

  • Ensure all treatments are performed according to brand and medical-grade standards

  • Stay updated on scalp care trends, products, and treatment technology

3. Team Leadership & Training

  • Lead, motivate, and manage scalp therapists and salon staff

  • Conduct onboarding, product training, and treatment skill coaching

  • Monitor staff performance and provide regular feedback

  • Enforce service standards, grooming, and professional conduct

  • Assist in recruitment and staff development planning

4. Customer Experience & Relationship Management

  • Deliver high-quality customer consultations and aftercare advice

  • Handle customer enquiries, feedback, and complaint resolution professionally

  • Build long-term client relationships and encourage repeat visits

  • Monitor customer satisfaction and service consistency

  • Support VIP clients and key accounts when required

5. Sales & Business Performance

  • Drive treatment packages, memberships, and product sales

  • Set and track monthly sales targets and KPIs for the team

  • Monitor conversion rates from consultation to treatment

  • Upsell appropriate products without over-selling

  • Prepare sales reports and performance analysis for management

6. Inventory & Stock Control

  • Manage stock levels of scalp treatment products and consumables

  • Monitor product usage and minimize wastage

  • Coordinate ordering, receiving, and stock take

  • Ensure proper storage and product expiry control

7. Marketing & Promotion Support

  • Support salon promotions, campaigns, and special events

  • Ensure staff are trained on current promotions and pricing

  • Assist in content creation (before/after photos, testimonials) where required

  • Participate in mall or external promotional activities

8. Compliance & Reporting

  • Ensure compliance with company policies and local regulations

  • Maintain accurate customer records and treatment documentation

  • Prepare weekly and monthly operational reports

  • Follow data protection and customer confidentiality guidelines

postedCompany.description:
DrScalp is a pioneer in advanced scalp health solutions, and is a Singapore-based, science-driven scalp-care clinic offering AI analysis and advanced treatments for healthier hair and scalp.


Our mission 

To provide our customers with customised treatments that address the root cause of scalp issues like hair loss, dandruff and inflammation. We combine state-of-the-art technology with personalised care to help you achieve healthier hair from the scalp up.


Our Vision
We believe that everyone deserves healthy, beautiful hair and that starts with proper scalp care. Our vision at DrScalp is to make cutting-edge scalp treatments accessible to everyone, ensuring long-term health and visible results. We’re here to transform the way you think about scalp health.


Our Commitment
We are committed to not only providing the best treatments but also educating our customers. We believe in empowering everyone with the knowledge to maintain a healthy scalp long after they leave our centre. From your first consultation to ongoing care, we’ll be with you every step of the way.
postedCompany.name: DRSCALP PTE. LTD.
